inline_comments: Create a receipt/summary card (for orders, transactions, data tables) Editorial design: Clean table layout with alternating row backgrounds, prominent total section, and clear visual hierarchy.
Create a calendar event card (for meetings, appointments, reminders) Editorial design: Date as hero, strong typographic hierarchy, color-blocked zones, full text wrapping for readability.
Hero date block - the most important information
If no time and not all day, hide the time display
Details section (location + description) in subtle background
Create a calendar agenda card showing multiple events Editorial timeline design: Time-focused left column with event details on the right. Visual accent bars indicate event priority/recency.
Header with title and optional subtitle
